title: machine should expose the devices available
body:
### Feature request description

Devices available on a given machine cannot be listed without ssh inside the machine. NVIDIA support the [Container Device Interface](https://docs.nvidia.com/datacenter/cloud-native/container-toolkit/latest/cdi-support.html#support-for-container-device-interface) however we have no way of checking if the device is installed or not.



### Suggest potential solution

The devices capabilities could be added to the `podman machine inspect`

### Have you considered any alternatives?

ssh in the machine and read the `/etc/cdi/` and `/var/run/cdi` file.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body:
This could be a slippery path?  Exposing other parts of the OS via podman machine inspect.

File system mounts, df, lspci, getent ...
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
